title: Move limitation
description: Stop your opponents and build defenses around your base with this mod!
body:
# Description
Move limitation is a mod that will add various ways to limit the movement of opponents, for example, the mod will add modular doors, traps, barbed wires and sandbags.

# Features
**Modular doors** can be extended up to five blocks in length. A redstone signal is needed to activate them. They can move in different directions
**Traps** stop opponents and deal damage to them. To recharge them, you need to send a redstone signal
**Sandbags** can withstand explosions
